text: we spend our whole lives collecting memories just to forget most of them
NATO is basically a discord server with nukes
my mass email said 'sorry for any inconvenience' bro you ARE the inconvenience
i think my therapist is running out of things to say about me
accidentally called my boss 'babe' on a zoom call and now im updating linkedin
the gym is just adult daycare with mirrors
sleep is just free trial death and honestly im into it
my salad was so boring i started dissociating
i have mass notifications from apps i downloaded during my 'self improvement' era
whoever invented the open office plan has never met another human being
my screen time report just dropped and honestly dont look at me
china could hack our grid tmrw and wed still argue about pronouns
i eat shredded cheese at 2am like a raccoon and i have made peace with this
dating apps are just pokemon go but everyone is a zubat
kubernetes was invented by someone who hated other developers personally
my cat watches me cry and then knocks my water off the table. respect honestly
pineapple on pizza is fine. you people just have no range
the fact that monday exists every single week is a systemic failure
tried to adult today. got a migrane and ordered doordash. 0/10
russia invading ukraine was the season finale nobody asked for
my wifi cut out during a deadline and i saw god for a second
hot take: cereal is a soup and you cant change my mind
i wrote 'per my last email' and it was the most violent thing ive ever done
we put a man on the moon but my printer still wont connect to wifi
someone at work asked if im ok and i almost told the truth
javascript was made in 10 days and it shows. every single day it shows
if mercury is in retrograde one more time im gonna lose it
tinder is just competitive loneliness at this point
the middle east has been 'about to stabilize' for my entire lifetime
ate a family size bag of chips alone. i am the family
my code works and i have no idea why. this is worse than it not working
every time i open twitter i lose 3 months of therapy progress
normalize leaving parties at 9pm. ive done my time
the EU regulates everything except vibes apparently
i make sex noises when i stretch and its becoming a workplace issue
coffee isnt a personality trait but without it i dont have one
my landlord raised the rent like he raised the bar. for no reason
the us national debt is just a number at this point. like my age. meaningless
walked into a glass door at the office. security camera caught it. im done
i wish i was as confident as the wifi signal shows 'full bars' then loads nothing
dating in your 30s is just two people googling each others red flags
microservices are just regular services with a marketing team
my toxic trait is thinking i can mass cook on sunday and not order takeout by tuesday
if a tree falls in a forest does it still need a jira ticket
my talking stage lasted longer than most NATO peace negotiations
i have 47 open tabs and no answers. this is research
saying 'im fine' is my most performed song. multi platinum at this point
alexa play despacito but make it my will to live slowly fading
bread is just edible sponge when you think about it and i cant stop thinking about it
the UN is basically a group chat where nobody reads the messages
my posture rn would make a chiropractor cry actual tears
recruiters be like 'exciting opportunity' bro its data entry in ohio
i have the sleep schedule of a vampire and the income of a serf
standing desks are just vertical suffering with extra steps
my brain at 3am: what if chairs have feelings. my brain at work: empty
the AI bubble is giving 2000s dotcom energy and we learned nothing
ppl who reply all to company emails are a different breed of unhinged
i said 'thats what she said' at a funeral. it was reflex. im sorry
my crush liked my story from 2019. we're basically engaged now
docker containers are just jars for code. we're all just making jam
the fridge light is the only light in my life rn not gonna lie
normalize telling ppl their food smells bad in the office microwave
i once cried at a linkedin post and thats when i knew it was over for me
taiwan is just vibing while superpowers play chess around it
my imposter syndrome has imposter syndrome
imagine explaining git merge conflicts to a medieval peasant. theyd get it actually
my love language is sending memes at 1am with no context
every gym bro is one injury away from becoming a podcast host
butter on literally anything is a cheat code and the government knows it
i peaked in 2019 and have been doing a slow descent ever since
meetings that could have been emails that could have been nothing
inflation said 'transitory' and then moved in permanently lol
my coworker chews so loud i can hear it through my noise cancelling headphones
the horny thoughts hit hardest at exactly 11:47pm. like clockwork
i flirt like i code. badly and with lots of errors
my uber eats driver has seen me more than my own mother this year
every vpn ad acts like the fbi cares about my browsing history. they dont. its sad
is it a panic attack or did i just drink too much coffee. schrodingers anxiety
nuclear deterrence is just everyone pointing guns at each other forever. cool system
my plants died because i forgot to water them. im not ready for kids
linkedin influencers are just motivational posters that learned to type
the 'seen' feature on messages was invented by an actual sadist
i have more unread emails than most countries have citizens
my bed and i are in a committed relationship. everything else is a distraction
caught myself saying 'back in my day' at 28. its over
regex is just keyboard smashing that sometimes works
eating bread at midnight isnt a meal its a spiritual experience
my search history would end careers. plural
supply chain issues are just global 'your order is delayed' emails
the only exercise i get is jumping to conclusions and running late
my screen time is 11 hours. the other 13 hours i sleep and think about screens
whoever decided work starts at 9am clearly never met a pillow
mayo is just egg lotion and yes i will die on this hill
i whispered 'harder' at the massage place and the silence was deafening
climate summits are just networking events for people who fly private jets
my code review comments are just 'lgtm' because i also dont understand it
the void stared back and honestly it seemed just as confused as me
every sourdough starter is just a tamagotchi for millennials
i have trust issues because of javascript type coercion
my bank account is giving negative vibes. literally negative
